title: lagerstroemia langkawiensis
intro: Lagerstroemia langkawiensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Lythraceae, commonly known as the Langkawi crape myrtle or crape myrtle. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Lagerstroemia langkawiensis include its ability to treat various conditions such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and reduce inflammation. Lagerstroemia langkawiensis is often prepared into herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are used to treat a range of health issues.
